mapper.sql: id, title, category, explanation_zh, explanation_en, key_rules, common_errors, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT gp.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_grammar_points gp LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND sr.content_id = gp.id
ORDER BY gp.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_grammar_points gp LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND sr.content_id = gp.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_grammar_points (id, title, category, explanation_zh, explanation_en, key_rules, common_errors, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{category}, #{explanationZh}, #{explanationEn}, #{keyRules}, #{commonErrors}, #{difficulty}, #{skillTags}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_grammar_points SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, explanation_zh = #{explanationZh}, explanation_en = #{explanationEn}, key_rules = #{keyRules}, common_errors = #{commonErrors}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_grammar_points (id, title, category, explanation_zh, explanation_en, key_rules, common_errors, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{p.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{p.title}, #{p.category}, #{p.explanationZh}, #{p.explanationEn}, #{p.keyRules}, #{p.commonErrors}, #{p.difficulty}, #{p.skillTags}, #{p.topicTags}, #{p.createdAt}, #{p.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT gp.* FROM ielts_grammar_points gp WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND sr.content_id = gp.id ) ORDER BY gp.difficulty, gp.id LIMIT #{limit}
